Home.subtitle: Dive into the world of science right from your pocket.
Home.description: Science shouldn't feel distant. Our mission is to transform complex academic research and breakthrough news into engaging, accessible insights for everyone. Built to bring the value of scientific discovery to all.
Home.newsDesc: Catch up on the rapidly evolving world of technology and science. Get daily updates summarized by AI to keep your knowledge current and sharp.
Home.papersDesc: Selected high-impact research from clinical and academic sources. We provide dual-level summaries for both experts and curious beginners.
Home.searchDesc: Go beyond keywords. Search for papers by their meaning. Ask questions directly to our AI and get immediate academic insights from our complete archive.
Home.labDesc: Have a research idea? Validate your hypotheses, get experimental suggestions, and explore new fields with our AI research partner.
Home.valueDesc: We believe that the frontier of human understanding should be accessible to all. Pocket Dive bridges the gap between deep research and everyday curiosity.

About.title: Operator Information
About.description: Pocket Dive is a non-profit exploration platform dedicated to improving accessibility to scientific information. Using AI technology, we organize and summarize complex academic papers and the latest scientific news, building an environment where everyone from students to experts can touch the forefront of science.
About.motivation: With the advancement of science and technology, the latest knowledge is accumulated as a huge amount of information every day. However, there is a thick wall of 'information gap' between specialized academic knowledge and the society that needs it. This project aims to provide an environment where young explorers standing at the entrance of academic research can dive into the abyss of knowledge in the shortest distance based on their own interests without being frustrated by language barriers or technical terminology barriers.
About.compliance: This project is operated based on the spirit of academic open access.
About.complianceList1: Information Source: We target only open access repositories with clear licenses such as arXiv.
About.complianceList2: Respect for Intellectual Property Rights: In AI summarization generation, we thoroughly implement a method of reconstructing only factual relationships without imitating the expression of the original work.
About.complianceList3: Rights Protection: If there is a request for deletion from the copyright holder regarding the posted information, we will respond promptly. Please contact contact@pocket-dive.app.
